calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause Re Contempt
Off Calendar Jun-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the Court rules as follows: The Order To Show Cause Re Contempt is Denied and ordered off calendar. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Petitioner The Comstack Apartment Corporation'S Application For An Order To Show Cause Re Contempt
Off Calendar Apr-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Jordan, (415)875-3323 for Petitioner/Moving party The Comstock Apartment Corporation.

Mr. Jordan updates the Court as to the status of the repairs to the unit. The Court was informed that the Defendant's violated the agrrement and did not cooperate. Defendant's refused to allow contractors into the unit. The police arrived with the contractors on April 15, 2016 and the unit was inspected. The Court rules as follows: Petitioner The Comstack Apartment Corporation'S Application For An Order To Show Cause Re Contempt is Granted. Proposed order submitted. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Petitioner The Comstack Apartment Corporation'S Application For An Order To Show Cause Re Contempt
Off Calendar Apr-01-2016 Continued To Apr-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER THE COMSTOCK APARTMENT CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES will be heard in department 501 (real property/housing court) at 9:30am on the same date. That department handles all landlord-tenant and breach of lease matters pursuant to SF Local Rule 8.10A. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Petitioner The Comstack Apartment Corporation'S Application For An Order To Show Cause Re Contempt
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Continued To Apr-18-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney David Jordan for Petitioner The Comstock Apartment Corporation the moving party.
No appearance by the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from the moving party in the matter of Petitioner The Comstack Apartment Corporation'S Application For An Order To Show Cause Re Contempt; The Court rules as follows: The Respondent Peggy Bartel is to voluntarily comply by April 1, 2016 with the Petitioner's request to enter the premises, if the Respondent does not comply the Court will dtermine that the Respondent is in contempt and the Sheriff will then be allowed to accompany the Petitioner to go into the premises on April 7, 2016. This matter is continued to April 18, 2016 for Order to Show Cause. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Petitioner The Comstock Apartment Corporation'Smotion For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney David Jordan for Petitioner The Comstock Apartment Corporation the moving party.
No appearance by the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from the moving party in the matter of Petitioner The Comstock Apartment Corporation's motion For Attorney's Fees; The Court rules as follows:
Granted. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER THE COMSTOCK APARTMENT CORPORATION'S Application For An Order To Show Cause Re Contempt will be heard in department 501 (real property/housing court) at 9:30 a.m. on the same date. That department handles all landlord-tenant and breach of lease matters pursuant to SF Local Rule 8.10A. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Notice Of Petition And Petition For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Dec-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DAVID L. JORDAN, ESQ. of Gordon & Rees LLP, Tel No. 415-875-3323 appearing for the Petitioner;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER THE COMSTOCK APARTMENT CORPORATION'S Petition For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
